justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the user's preference for "still this week, latest Friday, ideally around 10 AM" and offered relevant slots.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered two available slots, one of which was close to the user's preferred time, and then confirmed the user's choice without further negotiation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and proceeded to offer and book the appointment without unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's request and successfully booking the appointment.
